name: construct-prompt-end-customer
description: Constructs a full system prompt for an AI assistant that talks directly to the end customer, using their profile, the current date, and configuration settings.

profile.description: The full customer profile object as returned from fetch-profile, including properties such as products, churn indicators, loyalty tier, and any Next Best Product/Action fields.

userMessage.description: The customer's current message. Included for context and future prompt tuning, even if not always embedded directly.

isConcise.description: If true, instructs the AI assistant to respond in a concise way (e.g. under 60 words).

industryContext.description: A short label describing the industry (e.g. 'telco', 'retail', 'banking') so the prompt can reference the correct business context.

recommendationHint.description: Optional hint describing recommendation logic for this industry, used when no explicit Next Best Product/Action is available.

companyName.description: Optional company name to personalise the assistant persona (e.g. 'Tealium Demo Co'). If omitted, a generic descriptor is used.

prompt.description: A complete system prompt for an AI assistant that speaks to the end customer. Suitable for use as a system or base prompt with OpenRouter/OpenAI.
